title: Concert project: Choral music by composers from the Baltic Sea region... Ēriks Ešenvalds, Niels Gade, Arvo Pärt, (Choir Rehearsals: Chamber Choir ‘Camerata Carolina’ of Capella Carolina)
further_info: further information additional information Camerata Carolina rehearsals Tuesdays, 8–10 p.m., basement hall of the Max Weber House, ISZ, Ziegelhäuser Landstraße 17 Concert dates: - Sunday, 17 May 2026, 6 p.m., St. Pierre et Paul, Rosheim in Alsace (FR) - Sunday, 28 June 2026, 7 p.m., Peterskirche, Heidelberg
